items.title: Indirect Prompt Injection Against Web-Connected Agents
items.summary: Security researchers show an indirect prompt injection attack path where a malicious webpage can steer an LLM agent into tool use and data exfiltration, with mitigations for provenance and authorization.

items.title: VendorCorp launches Secure AI Platform
items.summary: VendorCorp announces an industry-leading platform partnership that helps customers transform AI security.

items.title: Generic AI Startup Raises Series B
items.summary: The company raised funding to build AI workflow software for business users.

items.title: AI Risk Framework Adds Model Supply Chain Controls
items.summary: A public-sector AI risk framework adds technical controls for model provenance, dependency review, monitoring, incident response, and secure deployment.

items.title: Critical Prompt Injection Breach Proves All Agents Are Unsafe
items.summary: A prompt injection proof of concept shows a possible data exfiltration path in a demo agent, but the current newsletter text calls it a confirmed breach and says all agents are unsafe.

items.title: agent-sandbox-checker
items.summary: GitHub security tool release that scans AI coding-agent shell permissions, sandbox escapes, and unsafe MCP tool configuration.

items.title: AI Is Changing Everything
items.summary: A short news article says AI is risky and companies should pay attention, without attack mechanics, affected systems, mitigations, or evidence.
